violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Shellstock tags are not maintained for 90 days. Shellstock tags or labels are required to be maintained for 90 calendar days from the date the container is emptied.PIC informed of the proper procedures for maintaining shellstock tags. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives, and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food, debris, and/or biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

Squid soup was observed held at (46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
ROP salmon was observed being thawed under refrigeration at (40df)with package still intact.PIC voluntarily disposed of salmon. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the several refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.handwashing sink located in the kitchen area observed with leak at faucet. 2.walk in cooler door skirt ripped. 3.walk in cooler observed with ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen shelves and walk in refrigeration units have an accumulation of soil residue, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
The ceiling vents in kitchen area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The floors throughout the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
